title_en: Separatist group and alleged misuse of voter-list data
description_en: A separatist-aligned group (the 'Centurion' project) was reported to have obtained voter-list data; an RCMP review of alleged misuse of voter records followed.
verification_notes: Batch-authored from manual intake 2026-06-07 (3/3 sources resolved). Suppressed pending editorial verification of framing, dates, and corroboration.
